title: Masternodes

startConfirm.title: Start Masternode
startConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to start masternode "{{alias}}"?
startConfirm.messageAll: Are you sure you want to start all masternodes?
startConfirm.messageMissing: Are you sure you want to start all MISSING masternodes?

removeConfirm.title: Remove Masternode
removeConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to remove masternode "{{alias}}"? This cannot be undone.

note.title: Note:
note.line1: Status of your masternodes in local wallet can potentially be slightly incorrect.
note.line2: Always wait for wallet to sync additional data and then double check from another node
note.line3: if your node should be running but you still see "MISSING" in "Status" field.

autoRefreshStatus: Status will be updated automatically in (sec):

network.description: All masternodes currently active on the network
network.noResults: No masternodes match your filter criteria

paymentStats.title: Payment Statistics
paymentStats.noData: No payment data available. Payment statistics are built from blockchain scan on startup.

config.title: Masternode Configuration
config.noEntries: No masternodes configured. Click "Add" to create one.

form.privateKeyHint: Click "Generate" to create a new key, or paste an existing one
form.noCollateralAvailable: No suitable collateral UTXOs found. Send exact tier amounts to your wallet first.
form.collateralHint: Select a wallet UTXO with the correct tier amount (1M/5M/20M/100M TWINS)
form.pendingCollateralHint: Some UTXOs are waiting for 15 confirmations.

validation.aliasFormat: Alias must contain only letters, numbers, and underscores
validation.aliasExists: A masternode with this alias already exists
validation.ipFormat: IP must be in format IP:Port (e.g., 192.168.1.100:37817)

deleteConfirm.title: Delete Masternode
deleteConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to delete masternode "{{alias}}"? This will remove the entry from masternode.conf.

step1.title: Welcome
step1.subtitle: Let's set up your masternode
step1.description: This wizard will guide you through the process of configuring a new masternode. Before you begin, please ensure you have:

requirements.title: Requirements
requirements.vps: A VPS or dedicated server with a static IP address
requirements.collateral: Sufficient TWINS balance for your desired tier
requirements.wallet: Your wallet synced to the latest block

tierOverview.title: Masternode Tiers
tierOverview.description: TWINS supports 4 masternode tiers with different collateral requirements and reward weights:

step1.note: Higher tiers have proportionally higher chances of receiving masternode payments.

step2.title: Select Tier
step2.subtitle: Choose your masternode tier
step2.description: Select the tier based on your available collateral. Higher tiers require more TWINS but have higher payment weights.
step2.noTierAvailable: You don't have enough balance for any masternode tier. Please deposit more TWINS to your wallet.

step3.title: Select Collateral
step3.subtitle: Choose a collateral UTXO
step3.description: Select a wallet UTXO to use as collateral for your masternode. This UTXO will be locked and cannot be spent while the masternode is active.
step3.noUtxos: No suitable UTXOs found for {{tier}} tier. You need a UTXO with exactly {{amount}} TWINS.
step3.waitingForConfirmations: Your collateral UTXO is waiting for confirmations ({{count}}/15). It will become available automatically.

step4.title: Private Key
step4.subtitle: Generate or enter your masternode key
step4.description: Each masternode needs a unique private key. You can generate a new one or paste an existing key if you're migrating from another setup.
step4.keyHint: This key is used to sign masternode messages. Keep it secure!

step5.title: Network Config
step5.subtitle: Enter your VPS details
step5.description: Enter the IP address of your VPS where the masternode will run. The default port for TWINS mainnet is 37817.

step6.title: Alias
step6.subtitle: Name your masternode
step6.description: Choose a unique, friendly name for your masternode. This helps you identify it in your masternode list.
step6.aliasHint: Use only letters, numbers, and underscores

validation.format: Alias must contain only letters, numbers, and underscores
validation.exists: A masternode with this alias already exists

step7.title: Review & Confirm
step7.subtitle: Verify your masternode configuration
step7.description: Please review all the details below. Once confirmed, the masternode entry will be added to your configuration.
step7.successHint: You can now start your masternode from the Masternodes page.
